demographics.audit_notes: Values aligned with 1990 Decennial Census for Tract 24.11, which strongly overlaps with Garrison Park East. Original values were very close, minor adjustments made for precision. 'Garrison Park East' is an approximation of one or more census tracts; Tract 24.11 is the primary component.
Original values represent a reasonable linear interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census data.
